<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_Collier%27s for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#if:{{{noicon|}}}||{{#if:{{{wstitle|}}}||[[File:PD-icon.svg|alt=public domain|12px|link=]] }}}}<!--
-->{{#if:{{{vb|}}}|{{#if: {{{inline|}}}|One or more of the preceding sentences|This article}} incorporates text from a publication now in the [[:en:Public domain|Public domain]]: |}}<!--
-->{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=cite encyclopedia
  |_exclude=display, inline, no-icon, noicon, short, wstitle, vb, _debug
  |_reuse=title <!-- these are reused -->

 |encyclopedia=[[Collier's Encyclopedia|Collier's New Encyclopedia]]

 |editor-first={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Francis J.}}
 |editor-last={{#if:{{{short|}}}||Reynolds}}
 |location={{#if:{{{short|}}}||New York}}
 |publisher={{#if:{{{short|}}}||P. F. Collier & Son Company}}

 |title={{#if:{{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|{{#if:{{{wstitle|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{cite wikisource/make link
             |link=Collier's New Encyclopedia ({{{year|1921}}})/{{{wstitle|{{{1|}}}}}}
             |anchor=
             |label={{{display|{{{wstitle|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
             |noicon={{{no-icon|{{{noicon|}}}}}}
           }}}}}}

 |year={{{year|1921}}}

<!--if wstitle is set do not pass on a url string-->
  |url={{#if:{{{wstitle|{{{1|}}}}}}||{{{url|}}}}}
 }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACEE}} |<!--is set-->
     |<!--Sort out the parameters-->
      {{#if:{{{vb|}}}|
                     |<!-- else-->}}
      {{#if:{{{1|}}}|}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
